targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted = 'positive' AND ground_truth = 'negative')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 4) AS value FROM decisions WHERE ground_truth IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(risk_score)::numeric, 4) AS avg_risk, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY risk_score)::numeric, 4) AS p95_risk FROM decisions WHERE created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Category Drift — Score Delta (baseline vs recent 7d)

targets.rawSql: WITH baseline AS (SELECT category, AVG(risk_score) AS baseline_avg FROM decisions WHERE created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY category), recent AS (SELECT category, AVG(risk_score) AS recent_avg FROM decisions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY category) SELECT b.category, ROUND((r.recent_avg - b.baseline_avg)::numeric, 4) AS score_delta FROM baseline b JOIN recent r USING (category) ORDER BY ABS(r.recent_avg - b.baseline_avg) DESC

WITH early AS (SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS early_count FROM decisions WHERE created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY category), recent AS (SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS recent_count FROM decisions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY category), totals AS (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decisions WHERE created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS early_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decisions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS recent_total) SELECT r.category, ROUND(r.recent_count::numeric / NULLIF(t.recent_total, 0), 4) AS recent_rate, ROUND(COALESCE(e.early_count, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(t.early_total, 0), 4) AS early_rate, ROUND((r.recent_count::numeric / NULLIF(t.recent_total, 0)) - (COALESCE(e.early_count, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(t.early_total, 0)), 4) AS delta FROM recent r LEFT JOIN early e USING (category), totals t WHERE (r.recent_count::numeric / NULLIF(t.recent_total, 0)) - (COALESCE(e.early_count, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(t.early_total, 0)) > 0.05 ORDER BY delta DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', r.created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(r.agreement_score)::numeric, 4) AS value FROM reviews r WHERE r.created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND r.created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tier = 'automated') AS automated, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tier = 'standard') AS standard, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tier = 'expert') AS expert FROM decisions WHERE created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
